In the main() function: 1) Prompt the user to enter the number of appointments they want to store. 2) Dynamically allocate an array of 'Time' structures based on this input. 3) Populate the array by calling 'setTime()' for each appointment. 4) Print all stored appointments sequentially using 'printTime()'. 5) Properly deallocate the dynamic memory before exiting.
